title: Celebi India International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Celebi India International Enterprises is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Celebi India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Celebi India International Enterprises:
Celebi India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Celebi India International Enterprises!
